privileged_info_summary: HAMMER COFFEE (Menu Item ID 25) is a real menu item in the Floreant POS v1.4 build 1707b Apache Derby demo database, located in the HOT DRINKS menu group with a default price of $2.00. The task requires changing this price to $3.50 via the back office interface using PIN 1111. The application is real, open-source, and publicly available at https://floreant.org/. The environment has OpenJDK 11 and a pre-populated Derby database with 100+ menu items. The task timeout is 180 seconds with a maximum of 40 steps; test executions complete within these limits (20 steps observed in successful run).
